modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use an even and factual tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Emails are being incorrectly routed to the deleted folder.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing an issue where incoming emails are being sent directly to the deleted folder instead of the inbox. This includes not only regular emails but also calendar updates, which are also disappearing into the deleted folder. An error message indicates that the system cannot find the meeting in the calendar, suggesting a potential misconfiguration.
short_description: Emails are being incorrectly routed to the deleted folder.
description: The user is experiencing an issue where incoming emails are being sent directly to the deleted folder instead of the inbox. This includes not only regular emails but also calendar updates, which are also disappearing into the deleted folder. An error message indicates that the system cannot find the meeting in the calendar, suggesting a potential misconfiguration.
